title: Conquest Recipes
description: Recipe Compatibility Add-On For Conquest Reforged
body:
**Conquest Recipes is a crowdsourced add-on that allows crafting of [Conquest Reforged](https://modrinth.com/mod/conquest-reforged) blocks and items. The recipes were created by ILikeToGetRekt and tested by his community.**

**Credits:**

- ILikeToGetRekt (recipes)
- CreativeRealms (mod/datapack setup)

You can follow him on [Twitch](https://www.twitch.tv/iliketogetrekt) for additional Conquest Reforged content.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/q29DWqht/images/d30a34df0f4c6b0b538b18120bbd39df3057822c.png)

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/q29DWqht/images/7f14ce2b10f347fe48b263d5c8041cf467b49ec5.png)

_**Note:**_ This mod will **not** work unless you have [Conquest Reforged](https://modrinth.com/mod/conquest-reforged) installed.

**Support:**

You can get support in the #support channel on the Conquest Reforged [Discord server](https://discord.gg/ZagrZvn).    
If any blocks are missing tool based dependencies or if you'd like to give general feedback about the latest update please contact Cole3050#5773 on Discord.

This project has been uploaded as a mod rather than a datapack so that users will not be required to add it manually to each world and for better compatibility in modpacks.
